MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Continued To Dec-05-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-10-2011 Continued To Nov-30-11 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Deutsche Bank National Trust Company is present. No representative.
Attorney Dave Marcolini specially appearing for Keenan McClenahan Law Office, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Eddie and Ana Moratoya are present.
Attorney Melvin Caesar Belli representing the defendant through limited scope.

Judge Ronald Quidachay, litigants and counsel confer privately in chambers, for settlement discussions.

The trial date of NOV-14-2011 is vacated. A settled protective date is set for 12-5-11.

An Order to Show Cause is issued for 11-30-11 for non-appearance of representatives with settlement authority.

Ntc Of Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Sep-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
DEFENDANT EDDY MORATOYA'S MOTION To Quash Service Of Summons IS DENIED. THE PROOF OF SERVICE ESTABLISHES VALID SUBSTITUE SERVICE. THE REQUEST TO PRESENT ORAL TESTIMONY IS DENIED. Prevailing party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR # 7489 =301/EHG
